Argument.Name: DIR
Argument.Description: The folder to search for file(s) to rename.

Option.Description: Enables renaming of multiple files at once. Otherwise, renaming will only proceed if exactly one file is matched.
Uses the current directory name instead of the input file name as the basis for renaming.
Does not perform any actual renaming, instead only simulating the rename operation.
Wildcard pattern to match file(s) to, such as "*.txt" or "Export*.*".
Instructs naming formats to prefer ISO date format to "friendlier" date formats.
Forces the command to proceed without any user input. This will bypass any prompts and skip formats that require user interaction
The separator to use between the components of a target name (where applicable).
